title: Enable/Disable batch automation capability (account / board level)
excerpt:
Hi, 
Being an administrator and account owner, it would be quite helpful to have the option of enabling/disabling selected, or all, automation rules in the account or board level instead of going one by one in a board or…

posts.author: baruchm (Baruch Moroz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
Being an administrator and account owner, it would be quite helpful to have the option of enabling/disabling selected, or all, automation rules in the account or board level instead of going one by one in a board or sometimes in more than a single board.

Thanks,
Baruch
